---
title: Portraits au stylo bille
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549266/portraitsbic_berjfu.jpg
description: Portraits au stylo bille
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2023-11-19
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549266/portraitsbic_berjfu.jpg)
